items.name: 😒 Bored Anime Mood – Dynamic Head
items.description:
Too cool to care? This expression says it all. Perfect for chill avatars, sassy roleplays, or anyone who’s totally over it. Designed in a clean anime art style and built as a dynamic head for expressive vibes.

✨ Join my group WaterCat Meow Meow for more kawaii and moody faces!
